skills.name: Attaque Composee
skills.description: Stab an enemy in front of you.

skills.name: Sept Etoiles
skills.description: Repeatedly stab enemies with your rapier. The attack ignores a portion of the enemy's defense.
skills.effect_text:
Skill factor: SkillFactor % x 7
Ignores enemy Defense by 15%

skills.name: Esquive Toucher
skills.description: Move swiftly to avoid enemy attacks and deliver complex successive attacks.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 5
Increases evasion by 100% while the skill is in use

skills.name: Preparation
skills.description: Twirl the tip of your sword to parry attack from enemy. Completely blocks the enemy's attack during the motion.
skills.effect_text:
Completely blocks the enemy's attack during the skill
Maximum Duration: 3 seconds

skills.name: Balestra Fente
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 4
Maximum Targets: CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Epee Garde
skills.description: Position yourself to launch a deadly attack on the enemy.
skills.effect_text:
Final Attack Damage + CaptionRatio %
Duration: 30 minutes

skills.name: Fleche
skills.description: Stab the enemy four times in a row. This attack has a higher critical rate on enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 4
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
Critical Rate x2

attributes.name: Attaque Composee: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Attaque Composee] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Sept Etoiles] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Epee Garde: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases final damage increase effect by 0.5% per attribute level when Critical Hit of [Epee Garde]

* Additional increase when mastering Maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Attaque Composee: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Attaque Composee] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Fencer: Parrying Dagger
attributes.description:
* Activates Block when equipping Dagger in the first slot or second slot(Block Grade increases according to the number of daggers equipped)

* Damage decrease rate due to Block is half of block damage rate due to Shield(includes PVE, PVP)

* Increases final damage by 2.5% for 3 seconds when succeeds in Block

attributes.name: [Arts] Esquive Toucher: Clean Dodge
attributes.description:
* Completely evades enemy's attack when using [Esquive Toucher]

* Able to evade for 1.5 seconds in PVP server when Arts is ON

* Increases cooldown by 10 seconds
